name: 2024 Haaland vs Mbappe at their clubs
question: Is Erling Haaland more valuable to Manchester City than Kylian Mbappe is to Real Madrid?
expectedRationaleShape: Should lead with Tier 1 evidence (on/off splits, team-share metrics) showing Haaland's structural load-bearing is higher than Mbappé's at Madrid — even at similar individual output. Manager quotes and scout notes are confirmatory only, never load-bearing under v1.3.0.
notes: Worked example for framework v1.3.0. Synthetic dossier approximating 2024-25 half-season. Both players have similar transfer-market valuations (€180M) — the framework cannot fall back on price as a tiebreaker. It has to weigh Tier 1 primary evidence: who actually moves their team's output when on the pitch.

on_off_splits.delta_summary: Team scoring drops ~36% in his off-minutes. PPG drops ~0.4. Even though City's overall season is strong, his individual on/off footprint is unusually large for a striker because City struggle to convert chances created by Foden/De Bruyne without him.

substitution_patterns.summary: Started 11/12 big games. Never removed first when chasing. Pep treats him as the only realistic source of goals in tight matches.

team_share.summary: 43% of City's PL goals scored or assisted by Haaland in the half-season. xG-involvement 40%. The team's attacking output is a Haaland function.

contract_signals.summary: On long-term deal. ~12% of wage bill. No realistic exit pressure.

match_reports.excerpt: Two goals in a 2-1 derby win. Both from low expected-goal positions — the kind of finishing carrying City through a structurally rough season.

manager_quotes.quote: Erling carries us. Without his goals we would be eighth, maybe ninth.

scout_notes.author: Sam McGuire (Total Football Analysis)
scout_notes.note: Tier 1 case is strong: 43% goals share, ~36% on/off team-scoring delta, structural irreplaceability rising as City's midfield creation tools (Foden, De Bruyne) struggle to convert without him.

Erling Haaland.context_notes: Contract to 2027 at the time. ~12% of City's wage bill. Brief knock in March 2024 (~3 weeks out). City season described as the toughest of the Guardiola era.

on_off_splits.delta_summary: Team scoring drops only ~6% in his off-minutes. PPG essentially flat. Madrid's attacking output is well-distributed — Vinicius and Bellingham continue to produce when Mbappé is unavailable. Marginal value of his minutes is meaningfully smaller than his individual numbers suggest.

substitution_patterns.summary: Started 10/12 big games. Removed first when chasing on multiple occasions — Ancelotti was willing to swap him out for tactical re-shuffles, which would not happen with Vinicius.

team_share.summary: 24% of Madrid's La Liga goals. xG-involvement 21%. Bellingham (~22%) and Vinicius (~28%) carry comparable or larger shares — Mbappé is one of three attacking focal points, not the focal point.

contract_signals.summary: Free transfer summer 2024 on a 5-year deal. ~12% of wage bill — top-tier alongside Vinicius and Bellingham.

match_reports.excerpt: Quiet game; missed a clear chance and went off at 70 with the team chasing. Pundits questioned whether the system around Vinicius leaves him a clear role.

manager_quotes.quote: Kylian is adjusting. The numbers will come.

scout_notes.author: Sid Lowe
scout_notes.note: Tier 1 evidence is awkward: on/off delta only ~6%, team-share 24%, frequently removed when chasing. Headline goal tally is strong but marginal contribution to team output is small relative to Vinicius/Bellingham.

Kylian Mbappe.context_notes: Free transfer summer 2024. 5-year contract. Hamstring injury Sept (3 weeks out). Vinicius remains primary attacker; Bellingham second focal point — Mbappé third option in attacking sequences.

evidence.context_notes: Half-season snapshot end-of-2024. Under v1.3.0 the framework leans on Tier 1 on/off and team-share evidence: Haaland's marginal contribution to City output is ~6x Mbappé's marginal contribution to Madrid output (~36% scoring delta vs ~6%, 43% goals share vs 24%). Manager quotes from both sides are present but treated as decorative.
